_description: BlueBubbles routing + identity rules. Both inbound webhooks and outbound sends are checked against these allowlists. Edit this file (no code changes) to widen/narrow which iMessage chats AI-Server is allowed to process.

inbound._comment: Chat GUIDs / phones / emails allowed to trigger automation. Empty list = only default_policy applies.

outbound._comment: Chat GUIDs / phones we will ever send to. Prevents accidental messages into unintended threads.

_policies.allow_owner_only: Allow only if sender/recipient matches owner (phones/emails lists). Block everything else.
_policies.allow_listed: Allow only explicit allow-lists. Unknown chats rejected.
_policies.allow_all: Dev mode — allow any chat (NOT recommended outside staging).
